channel.title: Dungeons & Dragons on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Dungeons & Dragons on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Discovering D&D In 1979
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about discovering DnD in 1979.

item.title: AD&D Design Pillars
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Advanced Dungeons and Dragons design pillars.

item.title: AD&D Questions From Teenage Tim
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to tell you some — well, read you some advanced Dungeons and Dragons questions from teenage Tim.

item.title: Questions To WotC About ToEE
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to share with you questions I sent to Wizards of the Coast about Temple of Elemental Evil.

item.title: D&D Influences (By Edition)
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about DND influences by addition.

item.title: My AD&D Mods
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about modding the original advanced Dungeons and Dragons.

item.title: My Brother's D&D Miniatures
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk to you about my brother’s DND D Miniatures.

item.title: Appendix N
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about appendix, and Josh James 582, asked for my thoughts on appendix n, which is in the DM’s guide for advanced Dungeons and Dragons, which lets me show off something I’m super excited about.

item.title: Picking Your Best Class in AD&D
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about picking your best class in a, d and d.
